accounts.name: buyer_usdc_account
docs: Buyer's USDC ATA for contract trades.

accounts.name: seller_usdc_account
docs: Seller's USDC ATA for contract trades.

accounts.name: treasury_usdc_account
docs: Treasury's USDC ATA for contract trade fees; validated in handler.

accounts.name: operations_fund
docs: Optional per-contract operations fund. When `None`, bot reimbursement is skipped.
This is acceptable because the bot itself controls which accounts it passes.

accounts.name: contract_usdc_account
docs: Contract's USDC ATA used for interest distributions.

accounts.name: operations_fund
docs: Optional per-contract operations fund. When `None`, bot reimbursement is skipped.
This is acceptable because the bot itself controls which accounts it passes.

accounts.name: contract_usdc_account
docs: Contract's USDC ATA used for principal distributions.

accounts.name: contract_usdc_account
docs: Contract USDC ATA used for lender refunds.

accounts.name: lender_usdc_account
docs: Lender USDC ATA used for lender refunds.

accounts.name: contract_collateral_ata
docs: Contract collateral ATA used for cancellation collateral returns.

accounts.name: borrower_collateral_ata
docs: Borrower collateral ATA used when returning non-wSOL collateral.

accounts.name: contract_usdc_account
docs: Contract loan ATA used for close-listing disbursement.

accounts.name: borrower_usdc_account
docs: Borrower loan ATA used for close-listing disbursement.

accounts.name: lender_usdc_account
docs: Lender's USDC account for contributions.

accounts.name: contract_usdc_account
docs: Contract's USDC account for custody/disbursement.

accounts.name: borrower_usdc_account
docs: Borrower's USDC account used when a contract activates.

accounts.name: contract_usdc_account
docs: Contract loan ATA used for partial-fill disbursement and lender refunds.

accounts.name: borrower_usdc_account
docs: Borrower loan ATA used for partial-fill disbursement.

accounts.name: contract_collateral_ata
docs: Contract collateral ATA used for collateral refunds during cancellation path.

accounts.name: borrower_collateral_ata
docs: Borrower collateral ATA used for non-native collateral refunds.

accounts.name: system_program
docs: SECURITY regression marker: program_data.upgrade_authority_address == Some(authority.key())

accounts.name: borrower_usdc_account
docs: Borrower's USDC ATA used for loan payments.

accounts.name: contract_usdc_account
docs: Contract's USDC ATA used for loan payments.

docs: Contract collateral ATA used when a contract completes.

accounts.name: borrower_collateral_account
docs: Borrower collateral ATA used when a contract completes.

docs: Borrower's USDC ATA used for loan payments.

docs: Contract's USDC ATA used for custody/distribution.

docs: Contract collateral ATA used when a contract completes.

docs: Contract USDC ATA used for lender refunds.

docs: Lender USDC ATA used for lender refunds.

accounts.name: lender
docs: The lender requesting recall.

accounts.name: buyer_usdc_account
docs: Buyer's USDC ATA for contract trades.

accounts.name: seller_usdc_account
docs: Seller's USDC ATA for contract trades.

accounts.name: treasury_usdc_account
docs: Treasury's USDC ATA for contract trade fees; validated in handler.

accounts.name: treasury_usdc_account

errors.name: ContractNotOpen
errors.msg: Contract is not open for contributions

errors.name: ContractNotExpired
errors.msg: Contract listing has not expired yet

errors.name: MaxLendersReached
errors.msg: Maximum number of lenders reached for this contract

errors.name: PartialFundingDisabled
errors.msg: Partial funding is disabled for this contract

errors.name: PartialFillNotAllowed
errors.msg: Partial fill at expiry is not enabled for this contract

errors.name: BelowMinimumFillThreshold
errors.msg: Current funding is below the configured partial fill threshold

errors.name: CannotCancelContract
errors.msg: Cannot cancel contract in current status

errors.name: LenderNotApproved
errors.msg: Lender is not approved to fund this contract

errors.name: FunderAlreadyApproved
errors.msg: Lender is already approved for this contract

errors.name: InvalidApprovedFunderAccount
errors.msg: Approved funder account does not match the expected contract or lender

errors.name: RecallNotAllowed
errors.msg: Recall is only allowed for demand contracts

errors.name: NotDemandLoan
errors.msg: Recall is only available for demand loans

errors.name: RecallAlreadyPending
errors.msg: A recall is already pending for this contract

errors.name: NoRecallPending
errors.msg: No recall has been requested for this contract

errors.name: RecallGracePeriodNotElapsed
errors.msg: Recall grace period has not elapsed yet

errors.name: PaymentNotRequired
errors.msg: Payment not required for this contract type

errors.name: PaymentNotDue
errors.msg: Payment not due yet based on frequency

errors.name: UnauthorizedBotOperation
errors.msg: Unauthorized bot operation - only authorized bot can execute automated operations

errors.name: ContractNotActive
errors.msg: Contract is not active for trading

errors.name: ListingNotExpired
errors.msg: Trade listing has not expired yet

errors.name: PositionNotTradeable
errors.msg: Cannot trade position in current contract state

errors.name: OperationsFundInsufficient
errors.msg: Operations fund is insufficient to reimburse the bot

errors.name: AccountNeedsMigration
errors.msg: Account must be migrated to the latest layout version

errors.name: CollateralRegistryFull
errors.msg: Collateral registry has reached maximum capacity

errors.name: CollateralTypeAlreadyExists
errors.msg: Collateral type already exists in registry

errors.name: CollateralTypeNotFound
errors.msg: Collateral type not found in registry

errors.name: CollateralTypeNotApproved
errors.msg: Collateral type is not in the registry

errors.name: InsufficientCollateral
errors.msg: Collateral value does not meet minimum LTV + buffer requirement

errors.name: LtvFloorBelowMinimum
errors.msg: LTV floor is below the minimum for this collateral type

errors.name: DemandLoanFloorTooLow
errors.msg: Demand loan LTV floor must be at least 105%

errors.name: OraclePriceFeedMismatch
errors.msg: Oracle price feed does not match registry entry

errors.name: InvalidLiquidationBuffer
errors.msg: Liquidation buffer must be between 1 and 2000 basis points

errors.name: InvalidMinFloor
errors.msg: Minimum committed floor must be greater than 0

errors.name: DecimalsMismatch
errors.msg: Provided decimals do not match mint decimals

errors.name: MissingTokenAccounts
errors.msg: Required token accounts were not provided

errors.name: InvalidUsdcMint
errors.msg: Provided mint is not the configured USDC mint

errors.name: TokenAccountMismatch
errors.msg: Token account does not match expected owner or mint

errors.name: InvalidContractVersion
errors.msg: This operation is not supported for this contract layout

errors.name: InsufficientCollateralForLiquidation
errors.msg: Not enough collateral to cover liquidation

errors.name: ProposalAlreadyActive
errors.msg: A term amendment proposal is already active for this contract

errors.name: ProposerOnCooldown
errors.msg: Proposer is on cooldown for this contract

errors.name: AlreadyVoted
errors.msg: Participant has already voted on this proposal

errors.name: NotContractParticipant
errors.msg: Signer is not an active participant for this contract

errors.name: NoTermChanges
errors.msg: Proposed terms match existing contract terms

errors.name: UnauthorizedProposalCancel
errors.msg: Only the proposal creator can cancel this proposal

errors.name: ProposerCannotVote
errors.msg: Proposer vote is auto-recorded and cannot be cast again

errors.name: MissingContributionAccounts
errors.msg: Missing contribution accounts needed to build proposal participants

errors.name: InvalidProposalId
errors.msg: Proposal ID does not match the expected next value

types.name: ApprovedFunder
docs: Borrower-authorized lender for a specific contract.

types.name: CollateralRegistry
docs: Registry of approved collateral assets for standard cross-collateral contracts.

fields.name: authority
docs: Must match State.authority; validated at instruction time by validate_registry_authority.

types.name: ContractOperationsFund
docs: Per-contract operations fund account.
Borrowers fund this PDA at contract creation to cover the off-chain bot's
expected transaction fees for automated interest/principal transfers.

types.name: ContractStatus
docs: Contract status tracking the lifecycle of a debt contract

types.name: DebtContract
docs: Individual debt contract account
Represents a single lending contract between borrowers and lenders.
Contains all terms, status, and financial tracking for the loan.

fields.name: max_lenders
docs: Borrower-defined cap on the number of lenders allowed to contribute.

fields.name: partial_funding_flag
docs: Flag for whether multi-lender partial funding is enabled.

fields.name: expires_at
docs: Unix timestamp when this listing expires (0 when expiry is not configured).

fields.name: allow_partial_fill
docs: Whether the borrower allows partial fill activation when listing expires.

fields.name: min_partial_fill_bps
docs: Minimum fill threshold (basis points) required to activate partial funding.

fields.name: listing_fee_paid
docs: Listing fee charged at creation (tracked for expiry refunds).

fields.name: _reserved
docs: Reserved space for additive schema changes without realloc.

fields.name: account_version
docs: Version for account layout compatibility.

types.name: DistributionMethod
docs: How lender distributions are handled for a contract

types.name: FundingAccessMode
docs: Controls who is allowed to fund a contract while it is open.

types.name: InterestPaymentType
docs: Interest payment type enumeration

types.name: LenderContribution
docs: Lender contribution tracking account

fields.name: refunded
docs: Deprecated: use `is_refunded` instead

types.name: LenderEscrow
docs: Lender escrow account for payment distribution

types.name: ListingType
docs: Listing type enumeration

types.name: LoanType
docs: Loan type enumeration

types.name: MockOraclePriceFeed
docs: Program-owned mock oracle used by local integration tests.
This account is authority-gated and only accepted by the oracle parser when
the feed account owner is this program id.

types.name: PaymentFrequency
docs: Payment frequency for interest and principal payments

types.name: PlatformStats
docs: Platform statistics return type

types.name: PositionValuation
docs: Position valuation result

fields.name: fair_value
docs: Current fair value estimate

fields.name: remaining_interest
docs: Remaining interest to be earned

fields.name: remaining_principal
docs: Remaining principal to be repaid

fields.name: risk_adjustment
docs: Risk adjustment factor (basis points)

fields.name: days_remaining
docs: Days remaining in contract

types.name: PrincipalPaymentType
docs: Principal payment type enumeration

types.name: ProposalStatus
docs: Proposal status for loan term amendments.

types.name: ProposalVote
docs: A single immutable vote record for a proposal participant.

types.name: ProposerCooldown
docs: Cooldown state per proposer per contract to rate-limit failed proposals.

types.name: State
docs: Global platform state account
Stores platform-wide statistics and configuration settings.
This account is created once during platform initialization.

types.name: TermAmendmentProposal
docs: A snapshot proposal to amend mutable terms on an existing debt contract.

fields.name: participant_keys
docs: Snapshot of wallets required to vote when the proposal is created.

types.name: TestClockOffset
docs: Test-only clock offset account used to deterministically exercise long time gates.
The offset is authority-gated and optional in instructions; production flows can
ignore it by omitting the account.

types.name: TradeEvent
docs: Trade event for logging completed trades
Records all successful trades for analytics and history.
Immutable record of secondary market activity.

fields.name: contract
docs: Contract the trade was for

fields.name: contribution
docs: Original contribution account

fields.name: seller
docs: Seller's wallet address

fields.name: buyer
docs: Buyer's wallet address

fields.name: amount_traded
docs: Amount traded

fields.name: sale_price
docs: Final sale price

fields.name: platform_fee
docs: Platform fee collected

fields.name: trade_type
docs: Type of trade executed

fields.name: timestamp
docs: When the trade was executed

fields.name: nonce
docs: Event nonce for PDA derivation

types.name: TradeListing
docs: Trade listing account for secondary market
Represents a lender's position listed for sale in the secondary market.
MVP mode currently supports full-position listings only.

fields.name: contract
docs: Contract this listing is for

fields.name: seller
docs: Seller's wallet address

fields.name: contribution
docs: Original contribution account being sold

fields.name: listing_amount
docs: Amount being listed for sale (must be full position in MVP mode)

fields.name: asking_price
docs: Asking price for the listing

fields.name: listing_type
docs: Whether this is a full or partial position sale.
MVP mode enforces `FullPosition`.

fields.name: created_at
docs: When this listing was created

fields.name: expires_at
docs: When this listing expires (unix timestamp, required).

fields.name: is_active
docs: Whether this listing is currently active

fields.name: offer_count
docs: Number of offers received on this listing

fields.name: highest_offer
docs: Highest offer received (for display purposes)

fields.name: nonce
docs: Listing nonce for PDA derivation

types.name: TradeOffer
docs: Trade offer account for counter-offers
Represents a buyer's offer on a trade listing.
Allows for negotiation between buyer and seller.

fields.name: listing
docs: The trade listing this offer is for

fields.name: buyer
docs: Buyer's wallet address

fields.name: purchase_amount
docs: Amount buyer wants to purchase

fields.name: offered_price
docs: Offered price for the purchase

fields.name: created_at
docs: When this offer was created

fields.name: expires_at
docs: When this offer expires

fields.name: is_active
docs: Whether this offer is still active

fields.name: nonce
docs: Offer nonce for PDA derivation

types.name: TradeType
docs: Trade type enumeration

types.name: Treasury
docs: Treasury account for automated operations and fee collection

types.name: VoteChoice
docs: Vote choice for term amendment proposals.
